com.solosoul.official.address-fmt.name: Address Formatter
com.solosoul.official.address-fmt.description: 地址格式化器 — 按目标国家/地区规范格式化 Vault 中的所有地址（中/美/英/日/德等）

zh.name: 地址格式化器
zh.description: 将 Vault 中的所有地址按目标国家/地区规范格式化输出。支持中国、美国、英国、日本、德国、法国、加拿大、澳大利亚、新加坡、韩国等10个国家/地区的地址格式。运行后会弹出对话框，按条展示格式化后的地址结果。

en.name: Address Formatter
en.description: Format all addresses in the Vault according to target country/region standards. Supports 10 countries/regions including China, US, UK, Japan, Germany, France, Canada, Australia, Singapore, and South Korea.

com.solosoul.official.calendar-events.name: Calendar Events
com.solosoul.official.calendar-events.description: 日历事件生成器 — 为护照/签证/身份证到期日生成 iCalendar (.ics) 提醒事件

zh.name: 日历事件
zh.description: 从 Vault 中提取日期相关信息，生成日历事件预览列表。

en.name: Calendar Events
en.description: Extract date-related information from the Vault and generate a calendar event preview list.

com.solosoul.official.contact-exporter.name: Contact Exporter
com.solosoul.official.contact-exporter.description: 联系人导出器 — 将 Vault 中的个人联系信息导出为 CSV 格式

zh.name: 联系人导出
zh.description: 将 Vault 中的联系信息导出为标准 vCard 格式。

en.name: Contact Exporter
en.description: Export contact information from the Vault into standard vCard format.

com.solosoul.official.data-completeness.name: Data Completeness
com.solosoul.official.data-completeness.description: 档案完整度扫描 — 检查 Vault 各分区完成度并给出补充建议

zh.name: 档案完整度
zh.description: 扫描 Vault 中的所有档案分区，计算完整度百分比并生成报告。

en.name: Data Completeness
en.description: Scan all sections in the Vault, calculate completeness percentage, and generate a report highlighting missing key fields.

com.solosoul.official.digital-will.name: Digital Will
com.solosoul.official.digital-will.description: 数字遗产指示 — 基于 Vault 数据生成紧急情况下的资产与账户处理建议（仅供参考，非法律文件）

zh.name: 数字遗嘱
zh.description: 基于 Vault 数据生成数字遗产分配建议。

en.name: Digital Will
en.description: Generate digital estate allocation suggestions based on data stored in the Vault.

com.solosoul.official.doc-checklist.name: Doc Checklist

1.0.1.changelog: 优化注册表元数据与插件描述信息

com.solosoul.official.doc-checklist.description: 材料清单检查器 — 根据签证/旅行/银行场景检查 Vault 中已有/缺失的材料

zh.name: 材料清单
zh.description: 根据目标场景反推 Vault 中已有和缺失的材料清单。

en.name: Doc Checklist
en.description: Infer existing and missing materials from the Vault based on target scenarios (visa application, bank account opening, etc.).

com.solosoul.official.emergency-card.name: Emergency Card
com.solosoul.official.emergency-card.description: 紧急联系卡 — 生成包含医疗信息和紧急联系人的应急卡片

zh.name: 紧急联系卡
zh.description: 生成紧急情况下使用的医疗/联系信息卡片，纯本地运行。

en.name: Emergency Card
en.description: Generate an emergency medical/contact information card. Data is stored locally with no network required.

com.solosoul.official.expiry-guardian.name: Expiry Guardian
com.solosoul.official.expiry-guardian.description: 证件到期卫士 — 扫描所有证件有效期并预警

zh.name: 到期卫士
zh.description: 扫描 Vault 中证件有效期，按 30/60/90/180 天分级提醒。

en.name: Expiry Guardian
en.description: Scan all documents (passports, visas, ID cards, credit cards) for expiration dates and sort by urgency (30/60/90/180 days).

com.solosoul.official.form-prefiller.name: Form Prefiller
com.solosoul.official.form-prefiller.description: 表单预填助手 — 根据签证/酒店/银行/航空等场景生成 Vault 字段映射表

zh.name: 表单预填
zh.description: 根据场景生成 Vault 字段到目标表单字段的映射表。

en.name: Form Prefiller
en.description: Generate a mapping table from Vault fields to target form fields based on the scenario (visa, bank, hotel, etc.).

com.solosoul.official.id-validator.name: ID Validator
com.solosoul.official.id-validator.description: 校验证件号码格式与校验位 — 支持中国居民身份证校验与护照格式检查

zh.name: 证件校验
zh.description: 校验各国证件号码格式与校验位。当前版本完整支持中国居民身份证校验，护照格式检查为实验性功能。

en.name: ID Validator
en.description: Validate ID number formats and check digits. Current version fully supports Chinese Resident ID Card validation, with experimental passport format checking.

com.solosoul.official.identity-timeline.name: Identity Timeline
com.solosoul.official.identity-timeline.description: 身份时间线 — 按时间顺序展示教育、工作、证件等人生里程碑

zh.name: 身份时间线
zh.description: 按时间线展示用户身份变迁历程。

en.name: Identity Timeline
en.description: Display the user's identity evolution over time, including education, work, visas, and asset acquisition milestones.

com.solosoul.official.mrz-encoder.name: MRZ Encoder
com.solosoul.official.mrz-encoder.description: MRZ 编码器 — 将护照信息编码为 ICAO Doc 9303 TD3 标准机读区格式

zh.name: MRZ 编码器
zh.description: 将护照/身份证信息编码为 ICAO Doc 9303 MRZ 格式。

en.name: MRZ Encoder
en.description: Encode passport/ID card information from the Vault into ICAO Doc 9303 standard Machine Readable Zone (MRZ) format.

com.solosoul.official.namecard-gen.name: Namecard Generator
com.solosoul.official.namecard-gen.description: 数字名片生成器 — 从 Vault 联系信息生成标准 vCard 3.0 数字名片

zh.name: 名片生成器
zh.description: 生成加密数字名片二维码，需 SoloSoul 扫码解密。

en.name: Namecard Generator
en.description: Generate an encrypted digital business card as a QR code, decryptable only by scanning with SoloSoul.

com.solosoul.official.packing-list.name: Packing List
com.solosoul.official.packing-list.description: 行李清单生成器 — 根据目的地和季节智能推荐旅行打包清单

zh.name: 行李清单
zh.description: 根据旅行记录智能生成行李清单建议。

en.name: Packing List
en.description: Intelligently generate a packing list suggestion based on travel records and destination information in the Vault.

com.solosoul.official.phone-fmt.name: Phone Formatter
com.solosoul.official.phone-fmt.description: 电话格式化器 — 按国家规范格式化电话号码（中/美/英/日等）

zh.name: 电话格式化
zh.description: 按目标国家/地区规范格式化电话号码。

en.name: Phone Formatter
en.description: Format phone numbers from the Vault according to target country/region dialing standards.

com.solosoul.official.resume-builder.name: Resume Builder
com.solosoul.official.resume-builder.description: 简历生成器 — 从 Vault 档案生成标准 Markdown 格式简历

zh.name: 简历生成器
zh.description: 从 Vault 提取信息自动生成标准简历。

en.name: Resume Builder
en.description: Automatically generate a standard-format resume by extracting education, work experience, skills, and languages from the Vault.

com.solosoul.official.tax-profile.name: Tax Profile
com.solosoul.official.tax-profile.description: 税务档案摘要 — 汇总税务居民身份、税号、收入来源等申报基础数据

zh.name: 税务档案
zh.description: 根据居住国与收入来源汇总税务申报基础数据。

en.name: Tax Profile
en.description: Summarize basic tax filing data based on the user's country of residence, income sources, and tax residency status.

com.solosoul.official.totp-gen.name: TOTP Generator
com.solosoul.official.totp-gen.description: TOTP 生成器 — 基于 Vault 中存储的 2FA Secret 生成 RFC 6238 动态验证码

zh.name: TOTP 生成器
zh.description: 基于 Vault 中 2FA Secret 生成 TOTP 动态验证码。

en.name: TOTP Generator
en.description: Generate 6-digit TOTP dynamic verification codes based on the 2FA Secret stored in the Vault, following RFC 6238.

com.solosoul.official.travel-footprint.name: Travel Footprint
com.solosoul.official.travel-footprint.description: 旅行足迹分析 — 统计到访国家、按大洲分类、生成旅行报告

zh.name: 旅行足迹
zh.description: 分析签证与旅行记录，生成到访国家统计与时间线。

en.name: Travel Footprint
en.description: Analyze visa and travel records in the Vault to generate country visit statistics, favorite regions, and travel timeline reports.

com.solosoul.official.watermark.name: 附件水印添加
com.solosoul.official.watermark.description: 为 Vault 中的图片/PDF 附件批量添加文本水印，所有修改仅作用于副本，不影响原始附件。

zh.name: 附件水印添加
zh.description: 为图片/PDF 附件批量添加文本水印，仅修改副本。

en.name: Attachment Watermark
en.description: Batch add text watermarks to image/PDF attachments; only copies are modified.

com.solosoul.official.slotgo.name: SlotGo
com.solosoul.official.slotgo.description: UK Visa 预约时间查询助手 — 自动查询可选递签时间档

zh.name: SlotGo
zh.description: UK Visa 预约系统辅助框架。

en.name: SlotGo
en.description: UK Visa appointment system assistant framework to help auto-fill and submit booking forms to the TLScontact system.
